hero.heading: Hi, my name is Arif.
hero.bio: Based in Semarang, Indonesia. Six years working alongside engineers, product managers, and clients to ship interfaces people can actually use — with the occasional detour into logos, branding, and illustration.

projectsIntro: Six years of UI/UX work across mobile and web — from first sketch to shipped screen. A few of the highlights below.

projects.title: Redesign: Samsat App
projects.description: A redesign concept for Samsat Online Nasional, the national service for vehicle-tax payment and annual validation, focused on clearing up a confusing payment flow.

projects.title: Audio Book Mobile App UI Kit
projects.description: A 60+ screen UI kit for an audiobook app, built entirely on Figma variables, styles, and variants, with full light and dark theme coverage.

projects.title: FitNow Website Design
projects.description: A marketing site for FitNow, built to walk visitors from service overview to a tailored fitness plan without friction.

projects.title: Employee Services App
projects.description: An integrated internal app for a state-owned port operator, covering attendance, forums, surveys, and agenda management for office staff.

experience.description: Working across the full product lifecycle, from early concepts to high-fidelity prototypes, ensuring each solution serves both user needs and business goals. Also contributing to the design system that keeps teams consistent and efficient.
Designed interfaces against client goals, partnered with product management on project scope, and improved existing products for usability, aesthetics, and function.
Took designs from research through prototyping into working static interfaces for web and React Native, and handled launch branding — store assets, presentations, and promotional material.
